title: comarostaphylis arbutoides subsp. arbutoides
intro: Comarostaphylis arbutoides subsp. arbutoides, also known as the strawberry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Comarostaphylis arbutoides subsp. arbutoides include its potential to help reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
